title: Fix customer creation persistence bug

requirements.text: Debug and fix the backend createCustomer function in backend/main.mo to resolve the immediate persistence failure that occurs when submitting the customer creation form with name, phone, email, and address fields

quotes: failed to add customer please try again - flashed at bottom

acceptanceCriteria: Customer creation form submission successfully persists data to backend storage
No 'Failed to add customer please try again' error appears after form submission
Newly created customer appears in the customer list immediately after creation
All four fields (name, phone, email, address) are correctly saved and retrievable

requirements.text: Verify the frontend CustomerForm component in frontend/src/components/customers/CustomerForm.tsx is correctly serializing and sending all customer data (name, phone, email, address) to the backend createCustomer mutation

quotes: failed to add customer everything else appears to be there

acceptanceCriteria: Customer form data is properly formatted before sending to backend
All required fields are included in the mutation payload
Form validation prevents submission of incomplete data
Error handling displays specific error messages if backend returns failure

requirements.text: Ensure the useCreateCustomer React Query mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts properly handles the backend response and updates the customer list cache after successful creation
acceptanceCriteria: React Query cache is invalidated or updated after successful customer creation
Newly created customer appears in the list without requiring page refresh
Loading states are properly managed during the creation process
Success and error states trigger appropriate UI feedback

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or other immutable paths
Preserve existing Customer type structure and data model
Ensure fix does not break other CRUD operations (read, update, delete)
nonGoals: Adding new customer fields beyond name, phone, email, address
Implementing customer data validation beyond basic required field checks
Modifying the customer form UI design or layout
Adding photo upload functionality in this fix
